coverage_note: The bundled IL6 population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from IL6 IL-6 receptor/gp130 signaling, JAK-STAT3 activation, acute-phase response, inflammation, and metabolic immune crosstalk and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000136244: IL6 coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: IL6 findings should be read against IL-6 receptor/gp130 signaling, JAK-STAT3 activation, acute-phase response, inflammation, and metabolic immune crosstalk; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

rs1800795 (IL6 -174G>C) is curated as a IL6 marker for Inflammation and acute-phase response context, Autoimmune and infection association research; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
